package rulecoverage

func NegativeRepositorySingleRecordWriteWithoutRowsAffectedCheck() string {
    ruleID := "repository_single_record_write_without_rows_affected_check"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Single-record-oriented repository updates or deletes that never inspect `RowsAffected` or an equivalent write-outcome signal."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
